Arguments.Name: in_TargetFile
Arguments.Tooltip: The file path of the target document that is going to be processed.

Arguments.Name: in_UseQueue
Arguments.Tooltip: Variable that checks if the Document Understanding Process is using Orchestrator Queues or not.

Arguments.Name: out_validationAction
Arguments.Tooltip: Orchestrator Validation Action that needs to be human-handled in order to continue the process.
